title: ST 558 Project 1
text:
learn structure of api call return

library(httr)

Warning: package 'httr' was built under R version 4.5.3

api_key <- "59c3be738e0d051c63b57b6327de0b11ef0f7a1e"

base_url <- paste0("https://api.census.gov/data/2022/acs/acs1/pums?get=SEX,PWGTP,MAR&for=state:*&SCHL=24&key=",
                   api_key)

api_return <- GET(base_url)

str(api_return)

List of 10
 $ url        : chr "https://api.census.gov/data/2022/acs/acs1/pums?get=SEX,PWGTP,MAR&for=state:*&SCHL=24&key=59c3be738e0d051c63b57b"| __truncated__
 $ status_code: int 200
 $ headers    :List of 12
  ..$ cache-control               : chr "max-age=60, must-revalidate"
  ..$ access-control-allow-origin : chr "*"
  ..$ access-control-allow-methods: chr "GET"
  ..$ access-control-allow-headers: chr "Origin, X-Requested-With, Content-Type, Accept"
  ..$ referrer-policy             : chr "same-origin"
  ..$ content-security-policy     : chr "default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self"| __truncated__
  ..$ x-content-type-options      : chr "nosniff"
  ..$ content-type                : chr "application/json;charset=utf-8"
  ..$ date                        : chr "Tue, 16 Jun 2026 14:10:46 GMT"
  ..$ strict-transport-security   : chr "max-age=31536000"
  ..$ set-cookie                  : chr "TS010383f0=01283c52a4138334c2fcd5cb88128e80a76e9b8397f67ea9d438f0f0a626b83a3f8f819a4a238176adf806fa769efa35d76d"| __truncated__
  ..$ transfer-encoding           : chr "chunked"
  ..- attr(*, "class")= chr [1:2] "insensitive" "list"
 $ all_headers:List of 1
  ..$ :List of 3
  .. ..$ status : int 200
  .. ..$ version: chr "HTTP/1.1"
  .. ..$ headers:List of 12
  .. .. ..$ cache-control               : chr "max-age=60, must-revalidate"
  .. .. ..$ access-control-allow-origin : chr "*"
  .. .. ..$ access-control-allow-methods: chr "GET"
  .. .. ..$ access-control-allow-headers: chr "Origin, X-Requested-With, Content-Type, Accept"
  .. .. ..$ referrer-policy             : chr "same-origin"
  .. .. ..$ content-security-policy     : chr "default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self"| __truncated__
  .. .. ..$ x-content-type-options      : chr "nosniff"
  .. .. ..$ content-type                : chr "application/json;charset=utf-8"
  .. .. ..$ date                        : chr "Tue, 16 Jun 2026 14:10:46 GMT"
  .. .. ..$ strict-transport-security   : chr "max-age=31536000"
  .. .. ..$ set-cookie                  : chr "TS010383f0=01283c52a4138334c2fcd5cb88128e80a76e9b8397f67ea9d438f0f0a626b83a3f8f819a4a238176adf806fa769efa35d76d"| __truncated__
  .. .. ..$ transfer-encoding           : chr "chunked"
  .. .. ..- attr(*, "class")= chr [1:2] "insensitive" "list"
 $ cookies    :'data.frame':    1 obs. of  7 variables:
  ..$ domain    : chr "#HttpOnly_.api.census.gov"
  ..$ flag      : logi TRUE
  ..$ path      : chr "/"
  ..$ secure    : logi TRUE
  ..$ expiration: POSIXct[1:1], format: "Inf"
  ..$ name      : chr "TS010383f0"
  ..$ value     : chr "01283c52a4138334c2fcd5cb88128e80a76e9b8397f67ea9d438f0f0a626b83a3f8f819a4a238176adf806fa769efa35d76df0610a"
 $ content    : raw [1:1157911] 5b 5b 22 53 ...
 $ date       : POSIXct[1:1], format: "2026-06-16 14:10:46"
 $ times      : Named num [1:6] 0 0.00753 0.16327 0.48278 0.94378 ...
  ..- attr(*, "names")= chr [1:6] "redirect" "namelookup" "connect" "pretransfer" ...
 $ request    :List of 7
  ..$ method    : chr "GET"
  ..$ url       : chr "https://api.census.gov/data/2022/acs/acs1/pums?get=SEX,PWGTP,MAR&for=state:*&SCHL=24&key=59c3be738e0d051c63b57b"| __truncated__
  ..$ headers   : Named chr "application/json, text/xml, application/xml, */*"
  .. ..- attr(*, "names")= chr "Accept"
  ..$ fields    : NULL
  ..$ options   :List of 2
  .. ..$ useragent: chr "libcurl/8.14.1 r-curl/7.0.0 httr/1.4.8"
  .. ..$ httpget  : logi TRUE
  ..$ auth_token: NULL
  ..$ output    : list()
  .. ..- attr(*, "class")= chr [1:2] "write_memory" "write_function"
  ..- attr(*, "class")= chr "request"
 $ handle     :Class 'curl_handle' <externalptr> 
 - attr(*, "class")= chr "response"


looks like data is in content, need to parse:

suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))
library(jsonlite)

Warning: package 'jsonlite' was built under R version 4.5.3



Attaching package: 'jsonlite'


The following object is masked from 'package:purrr':

    flatten

parsed <- fromJSON(rawToChar(api_return$content)) |>
          as_tibble()

Warning: The `x` argument of `as_tibble.matrix()` must have unique column names if
`.name_repair` is omitted as of tibble 2.0.0.
ℹ Using compatibility `.name_repair`.

head(parsed)

# A tibble: 6 × 5
  V1    V2    V3    V4    V5   
  <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr>
1 SEX   PWGTP MAR   SCHL  state
2 2     6     5     24    17   
3 2     23    2     24    06   
4 1     23    3     24    42   
5 1     80    5     24    49   
6 1     16    1     24    18   


first row returned is var names, we’ll have to fix later
